description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, test, and deploy and a CONTAINER_NAME variable set to $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME. In the build stage add a .build job that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service, runs docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY, then docker build -t $CONTAINER_NAME . and docker push $CONTAINER_NAME. In the test stage add three jobs: .accessibility using the registry.gitlab.com/azae/docker/pa11y image and an aliased ajiro service pointing to $CONTAINER_NAME, executing pa11y-ci --sitemap http://ajiro/sitemap.xml --config pa11y.conf; .linkchecker using the registry.gitlab.com/azae/docker/linkchecker image with the same aliased service, executing linkchecker --anchors --ignore-url="^mailto:" https://ajiro/; and .url_count using the debian image with the aliased service, installing wget and xmlstarlet, counting URLs from https://ajiro/sitemap.xml and https://ajiro.fr/sitemap.xml with wget and xmlstarlet, and testing that the new count is greater or equal to the actual count. In the deploy stage add a publish job that runs only on the master branch, uses the debian:sid image, installs hugo, curl and rclone, builds the site with hugo for production and drafts, downloads the Scaleway CLI, configures it with $SCW_SECRET_KEY, obtains rclone configuration, and finally syncs the public/ directory to the Scaleway bucket scaleway:ajiro.fr/.
